mapper.select: SELECT * FROM location_cache WHERE ROUND(longitude, 3) = ROUND(#{longitude}, 3) AND ROUND(latitude, 3) = ROUND(#{latitude}, 3)
SELECT * FROM location_cache WHERE ROUND(longitude, 3) = ROUND(#{longitude}, 3) AND ROUND(latitude, 3) = ROUND(#{latitude}, 3) AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > #{currentTime})
